body:
Users want to switch the app between light and dark themes.

## Goal
Add a "Dark mode" toggle to the settings page (settings.html) that:
- Lets the user enable/disable dark mode.
- Persists the choice in localStorage (consistent with the other settings).
- Applies the dark theme to the page immediately when toggled, and on page load if previously enabled.

## Acceptance criteria
- A new labeled checkbox toggle appears in the settings section.
- Toggling it switches the page to a dark color scheme.
- The preference survives a page reload.
title: Add a dark-mode toggle to the settings page
